emails.subject: Congratulations
emails.body: Congratulations Dear Vince- I am soooo gland to see you get the promotion you so deserve. I have always thought you should have received such honors many years ago. I'm glad to see Enron finally did you right. Good luck and congratulations, Julie :-)
